D3DPERFEventsType

Describes the Direct3D performance event types.

typedef enum _D3DPERFEventsType{
    D3DPERFEvent_Header = 0,
    D3DPERFEvent_DrawVerticesUP = 1,
    D3DPERFEvent_DrawIndexedVerticesUP = 2,
    D3DPERFEvent_DrawVertices = 3,
    D3DPERFEvent_DrawIndexedVertices = 4,
    D3DPERFEvent_BeginEnd = 5,
    D3DPERFEvent_RunPushBuffer = 6,
    D3DPERFEvent_VBlank = 7,
    D3DPERFEvent_Kickoff = 8,
    D3DPERFEvent_Present = 9,
    D3DPERFEvent_BlockUntilIdle = 10,
    D3DPERFEvent_BlockOnFence = 11,
    D3DPERFEvent_PushBufferWait = 12,
    D3DPERFEvent_ObjectLockWait = 13,
    D3DPERFEvent_User0 = 21,
    D3DPERFEvent_User1 = 22,
    D3DPERFEvent_User2 = 23,
    D3DPERFEvent_User3 = 24,
    D3DPERFEvent_User4 = 25,
    D3DPERFEvent_User5 = 26,
    D3DPERFEvent_User6 = 27,
    D3DPERFEvent_User7 = 28,
    D3DPERFEvent_User8 = 29,
    D3DPERFEvent_User9 = 30,
    D3DPERFEvent_User10 = 31,
    D3DPERFEvent_Max = 32,
} D3DPERFEventsType;

Constants

D3DPERFEvent_Header
A user-defined performance header was inserted into the GPU.
D3DPERFEvent_DrawVerticesUP
Title called IDirect3DDevice8::DrawVerticesUP.
D3DPERFEvent_DrawIndexedVerticesUP
Title called IDirect3DDevice8::DrawIndexedVerticesUP.
D3DPERFEvent_DrawVertices
Title called IDirect3DDevice8::DrawVertices.
D3DPERFEvent_DrawIndexedVertices
Title called IDirect3DDevice8::DrawIndexedVertices.
D3DPERFEvent_BeginEnd
Title used a Begin/End Block. The event spans from between the time when the title calls IDirect3DDevice8::Begin to when the title calls IDirect3DDevice8::End.
D3DPERFEvent_RunPushBuffer
Title called IDirect3DDevice8::RunPushBuffer.
D3DPERFEvent_VBlank
A vertical blank occured.
D3DPERFEvent_Kickoff
The GPU's put pointer was updated to start processing push-buffer data.
D3DPERFEvent_Present
Title called either IDirect3DDevice8::Present or IDirect3DDevice8::Swap.
D3DPERFEvent_BlockUntilIdle
Title called IDirect3DDevice8::BlockUntilIdle.
D3DPERFEvent_BlockOnFence
Title called IDirect3DDevice8::BlockOnFence.
D3DPERFEvent_PushBufferWait
A push-buffer wait occured.
D3DPERFEvent_ObjectLockWait
An object-lock wait occured.
D3DPERFEvent_User0
A title defined event occured. This event could have been inserted using D3DPERF_BlockTimer.
D3DPERFEvent_User1
A title defined event occured. This event could have been inserted using D3DPERF_BlockTimer.
D3DPERFEvent_User2
A title defined event occured. This event could have been inserted using D3DPERF_BlockTimer.
D3DPERFEvent_User3
A title defined event occured. This event could have been inserted using D3DPERF_BlockTimer.
D3DPERFEvent_User4
A title defined event occured. This event could have been inserted using D3DPERF_BlockTimer.
D3DPERFEvent_User5
A title defined event occured. This event could have been inserted using D3DPERF_BlockTimer.
D3DPERFEvent_User6
A title defined event occured. This event could have been inserted using D3DPERF_BlockTimer.
D3DPERFEvent_User7
A title defined event occured. This event could have been inserted using D3DPERF_BlockTimer.
D3DPERFEvent_User8
A title defined event occured. This event could have been inserted using D3DPERF_BlockTimer.
D3DPERFEvent_User9
A title defined event occured. This event could have been inserted using D3DPERF_BlockTimer.
D3DPERFEvent_User10
A title defined event occured. This event could have been inserted using D3DPERF_BlockTimer.
D3DPERFEvent_Max
Maximum value allowed in the D3DPERFEventsType enumeration. This value is not used.

Requirements

Header: Declared in D3d8perf.h.
